# Celestial Convergence
## Scripture
"For since the creation of the world His invisible attributes, His eternal power and divine nature, have been clearly seen, being understood through what has been made, so that they are without excuse." - Romans 1:20

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the night sky, we witness a grand convergence of celestial bodies, each moving in harmony with the others. The planets align, the stars shine bright, and the galaxies swirl in a majestic dance. This convergence is a testament to God's eternal power and divine nature. Just as the celestial bodies work together in perfect harmony, our lives can reflect the beauty of convergence with God's plan. When we surrender our will to His, we experience a convergence of purpose, passion, and perseverance.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the celestial convergence in the night sky, we are reminded of Your eternal power and divine nature. Help us to converge our lives with Your plan, that we may reflect the beauty of harmony and purpose. May our lives shine bright like the stars, guiding others to the majestic dance of Your love and grace. We pray in Jesus' name, Amen.
